target_en: \"But... I've been living in Okinomiya all my life!
Since the old woman hated me, I've barely been to Hinamizawa!
Besides, I was stuck at school.
How would I know about any of that?!\"
...Ahahahaha. Actually, this is a secret, but... after the festival yesterday, I got wrapped up in the party my relatives were having.
And, well... it was a bit endless.\"
The party quite literally continued to the following morning.
I thought you'd be sleeping in today after the all-nighter, same as Mion.\"
